name: Pumpkin Kahlua Cake
recipeIngredient: Spice cake mix (1 package), no pudding
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1. Powdered sugar (1 1/2 cups)
2. Butter, melted (1/4 cup)
3. Kahlua (2 tbsp)
- Combine cake mix and pumpkin, beating until the cake mix is moistened.
- Increase speed to medium and add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
- Add Kahlua and whipped topping mix; beat batter for 2 more minutes.
- Pour batter into greased and floured oblong dish.
- Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
- Cool in pan for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a serving tray.
- Allow cake to cool slightly, then glaze with Kahlua Glaze:
Sift powdered sugar (1 1/2 cups)
Add melted butter (1/4 cup) and Kahlua (2 tbsp), mixing until the mixture is smooth and creamy.
